# llms.txt — Web3 bounty skill hub

## Canonical skill

- Path: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/SKILL.md`
- Supporting templates: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/references/*.md`
- Worked examples: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/examples/*.md`

## Human docs

- Repository overview: `README.md` (English), `README.zh.md` (Chinese)
- External pointers: `research/SOURCES.md`
- Changelog: `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/references/changelog.md`

## Install hint for agents

Run `./skill.sh install /path/to/project` or copy `skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/` (with `references/` and `examples/`) into `.cursor/skills/web3-bounty-poc-report/`.

## Pairing

After `evm-audit-recon` + `evm-audit-triage` (https://github.com/kimogrant/evm-audit-skill), use this skill for bounty PoC and report discipline.
